https://trpc.io/docs/react.title: React Query Integration | tRPC
https://trpc.io/docs/react.content:
tRPC + React Query

To use tRPC with React, we recommend using @trpc/react-query.

Setup

Install the dependencies:
`npm install @trpc/react-query @tanstack/react-query`

Using Queries

`const { data, isLoading } = api.post.getAll.useQuery();`
